response.global_analysis: 1. Transcription: The video contains a spoken announcement in English by VTubers Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis before their concert 'Drawn to Dawn'. 2. Timing & Pacing: Timed carefully to capture their spoken lines, laughter, playfulness, and transitions. 3. Output: Kept original English dialogue in 'og' and matching text in 'en'.

subtitles.original: Thank you all so much for coming to...
subtitles.english: Thank you all so much for coming to...

subtitles.original: ...Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis's first concert, Drawn to Dawn!
subtitles.english: ...Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis's first concert, Drawn to Dawn!

subtitles.original: Ki... Thank you, thank you.
subtitles.english: Ki... Thank you, thank you.

subtitles.original: Ki-ki-ri-ki!
subtitles.english: Ki-ki-ri-ki!

subtitles.original: I am Takanashi Kiara, and...
subtitles.english: I am Takanashi Kiara, and...

subtitles.original: Good morning, afternoon, evening, everyone! It's Ninomae Ina'nis!
subtitles.english: Good morning, afternoon, evening, everyone! It's Ninomae Ina'nis!

subtitles.original: That's right, it's finally time for our concert! Is everyone hyped?
subtitles.english: That's right, it's finally time for our concert! Is everyone hyped?

subtitles.original: Before we kick things off, we have some important safety rules and house guidelines to go over.
subtitles.english: Before we kick things off, we have some important safety rules and house guidelines to go over.

subtitles.original: First, photography and the use of any recording equipment are strictly prohibited during the performance.
subtitles.english: First, photography and the use of any recording equipment are strictly prohibited during the performance.

subtitles.original: Also, the venue is smoke-free, so please refrain from smoking inside.
subtitles.english: Also, the venue is smoke-free, so please refrain from smoking inside.

subtitles.original: But what... But what if I'm smoking hot?
subtitles.english: But what... But what if I'm smoking hot?

subtitles.original: Oh, Kiara...
subtitles.english: Oh, Kiara...

subtitles.original: If you start feeling unwell at any point, please don't push yourself. Just reach out to the nearest staff member for help, and hydrate!
subtitles.english: If you start feeling unwell at any point, please don't push yourself. Just reach out to the nearest staff member for help, and hydrate!

subtitles.original: For everyone's safety, please avoid any dangerous or disruptive behavior.
subtitles.english: For everyone's safety, please avoid any dangerous or disruptive behavior.

subtitles.original: This includes moshing...
subtitles.english: This includes moshing...

subtitles.original: No moshing, I mean it!
subtitles.english: No moshing, I mean it!

subtitles.original: Moshing, diving, sitting on shoulders, jumping excessively, or throwing objects towards the stage.
subtitles.english: Moshing, diving, sitting on shoulders, jumping excessively, or throwing objects towards the stage.

subtitles.original: Climbing onto the stage, intentionally blocking the aisles, or rushing toward the front is also (surprise!) not allowed.
subtitles.english: Climbing onto the stage, intentionally blocking the aisles, or rushing toward the front is also (surprise!) not allowed.

subtitles.original: Please refrain from disruptive shouting, erratic lightstick movements, or any extreme motions that might interfere with the experience of those around you. Be considerate!
subtitles.english: Please refrain from disruptive shouting, erratic lightstick movements, or any extreme motions that might interfere with the experience of those around you. Be considerate!

subtitles.original: If you don't follow the instructions of our staff or the venue staff, you may be asked to leave the venue.
subtitles.english: If you don't follow the instructions of our staff or the venue staff, you may be asked to leave the venue.

subtitles.original: Yes, please keep in mind that the venue organizers, performers, and staff cannot be held responsible for any accidents, equipment damage, or trouble caused by failing to follow instructions.
subtitles.english: Yes, please keep in mind that the venue organizers, performers, and staff cannot be held responsible for any accidents, equipment damage, or trouble caused by failing to follow instructions.

subtitles.original: Additionally, any costs for damages resulting from ignoring these rules will be the responsibility of the person involved, so be careful, guys, okay?
subtitles.english: Additionally, any costs for damages resulting from ignoring these rules will be the responsibility of the person involved, so be careful, guys, okay?

subtitles.original: There are cameras in the venue for filming and photography today, and you might appear in footage or photos.
subtitles.english: There are cameras in the venue for filming and photography today, and you might appear in footage or photos.

subtitles.original: These may be used for promotional purposes later on, so please keep that in mind.
subtitles.english: These may be used for promotional purposes later on, so please keep that in mind.

subtitles.original: And finally... big news! Today's concert will be in two parts!
subtitles.english: And finally... big news! Today's concert will be in two parts!

subtitles.original: There's a part for Kiara and a part for me, so please look forward to both of them!
subtitles.english: There's a part for Kiara and a part for me, so please look forward to both of them!

subtitles.original: All right! That is it for the rules. The show is about to begin, so get ready!
subtitles.english: All right! That is it for the rules. The show is about to begin, so get ready!

subtitles.original: Bye-bye!
subtitles.english: Bye-bye!

subtitles.original: Bye-bye! See you!
subtitles.english: Bye-bye! See you!

subtitles.original: Tako-tori! Tako-tori! Tako-tori! Tako-tori! Tako-tori!
subtitles.english: Tako-tori! Tako-tori! Tako-tori! Tako-tori! Tako-tori!
